headline: Beyond the {accent}Code{/accent}.
tagline: Leadership and mentorship, not more engineering.

blocks.org: Festember, NIT Trichy's National Cultural Festival
blocks.dates: Deputy Manager (May 2021) to Manager (Jan 2022) to Head, Media Relations (Dec 2022 to Dec 2023)
bullets: Grew from a junior organizer into Head of a 24-person team spanning TV, radio, print, OTT, and social media.
Mentored 30-40 incoming students one-on-one through their transition to institute life.
Secured sponsorships from partner brands including Spotify, AGS Cinemas, Suryan FM, and Women's Era.
